title: Cloud Hosting Price Comparison 2026
description: Compare pricing across major hosting platforms for static sites, serverless functions, and databases. Find the cheapest option for your use case.

mainEntity.name: Which cloud provider has the best free tier?

acceptedAnswer.text: Cloudflare Pages offers unlimited bandwidth on their free tier, making it one of the most generous for static sites.

mainEntity.name: How much does AWS bandwidth cost?

acceptedAnswer.text: AWS typical outbound bandwidth costs around $0.09 to $0.15 per GB depending on the service and region.

mainEntity.name: Do Vercel and Netlify charge for bandwidth?

acceptedAnswer.text: Both offer an initial free allowance (typically 100GB), but charge significantly higher rates for overages compared to raw infrastructure providers.

mainEntity.name: Are custom domains free on hosting platforms?

acceptedAnswer.text: Yes, almost all modern hosting platforms include custom domain support on their free tiers.

mainEntity.name: Which platform is cheapest for edge functions?

acceptedAnswer.text: Cloudflare Workers/Pages often provide the most generous free limits and lowest costs for edge computing.
